documentation.content: Attribution capture observations are arriving incomplete or rejected. Runbook: __RUNBOOK_URL_ATTRIBUTION_COMPLETENESS__

conditions.displayName: Incomplete attribution capture observation is emitted

conditionMatchedLog.filter: resource.type="cloud_run_revision" AND jsonPayload.event="attribution_capture_observed" AND (jsonPayload.captureStatus="partial" OR jsonPayload.captureStatus="missing_session_id" OR jsonPayload.accepted=false)
